summary: Dark, very shaky first-person/body-cam footage of a nighttime targeted enforcement raid in Portland, Oregon: agents moving through yards in near-blackness with flashlight glare, then detaining people outside a house. The tweet itself bills it as a 'first person view of targeted enforcement,' and it is raw bodycam footage with no music or genre styling, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: Tweet: 'Follow along in this first person view of targeted enforcement... Self deport now or you may find yourself on the other side of the camera.'
